
  sleep-after-claude installer
  Installs goodnight, jq support, and Claude Code idle hooks.
  ─────────────────────────────────────────


  Claude Code hooks skipped
  ─────────────────────────────────────────
  Run goodnight --install-hooks later.
  Existing hooks are preserved.

# Installation complete 🌙

goodnight is installed at `~/bin/sleep-after-claude`.
